highlights: protocol defines 6 phases but protocol.json exposes no adopt ledger/event; adoption is only hinted via stampede.sh prompt text and ad-hoc broadcast/bundle prose
broadcast records are inconsistent: broadcasts.jsonl line 3 omits required evidence and uses adopted_items instead of consensus_item_id
consensus->broadcast->adopt is not fully traceable from ledgers alone; no forward pointer from consensus to broadcasts and no dedicated adoption ledger
gaps: No adopt ledger file exists under collab/ despite protocol workflow including adopt
stampede-commander.agent.md has no consume_broadcasts step; collab workflow is injected by launcher prompt, not the agent contract
Bundle shape in stampede-commander.agent.md omits adopted_consensus_item_ids/source_refs required by bin/stampede.sh prompt
Post-run auditors cannot verify item-by-item adoption from ledgers alone
evidence: collab/consensus.jsonl:1-5 (no broadcast pointer; line 5 missing evidence)
